plugins.prepareCmd: node scripts/bump-core-version.mjs ${nextRelease.version} && pnpm biome format --write packages/core/package.json
plugins.publishCmd: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 -f docker/Dockerfile --build-arg KIRO2CLAUDE_CLI_VERSION="$(jq -r .kiroCliVersion fixtures/kiro-cli-profile.json)" --build-arg KIRO2CLAUDE_IMAGE_SOURCE="https://github.com/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY" -t "ghcr.io/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER/kiro2claude:${nextRelease.version}" -t "ghcr.io/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY_OWNER/kiro2claude:latest" --push .
